# sync_fifo Verification Environment

Generated by VerifAgent on 2026-01-11 03:15

## Design Overview

Synchronous FIFO with parameterizable depth and data width, featuring write/read interfaces, status flags (full, empty, almost_full, almost_empty), count tracking, and error detection for overflow/underflow conditions

## Verification Approach

UVM-based constrained random with formal verification and directed tests

## Coverage Goals

- Code Coverage: 95%
- Functional Coverage: 100%
- Assertion Coverage: 100%

## Generated Files

- `tb/agents/sync_fifo_if.sv`: Interface for sync_fifo
- `tb/agents/sync_fifo_agent.sv`: UVM agent for sync_fifo
- `tb/env/env.sv`: UVM environment with scoreboard and coverage
- `tb/tests/tests.sv`: UVM test classes
- `assertions/sync_fifo_assertions.sv`: SystemVerilog Assertions
- `coverage/sync_fifo_coverage.sv`: Functional coverage
- `tb/tb_top.sv`: Testbench top module
- `Makefile`: Build and run scripts

## Running Tests

```bash
# Compile
make compile

# Run all tests
make regress

# Run specific test
make run TEST=test_name

# Generate coverage report
make coverage
```

## Directory Structure

```
├── rtl/              # RTL source files (add your DUT here)
├── tb/
│   ├── env/          # UVM environment
│   ├── agents/       # UVM agents
│   ├── tests/        # Test classes
│   └── sequences/    # Sequences
├── assertions/       # SVA assertions
├── coverage/         # Functional coverage
└── sim/              # Simulation scripts
```
